education.current: 6th Semester B.Tech in Computer Science Engineering (Specialization in AI & ML) at Nehru College of Engineering and Research Centre (NCERC), Thrissur, Kerala
education.previous: Diploma in Computer Engineering from St. Mary’s Polytechnic College

key_projects.title: Autonomous Campus Fleet Management System
key_projects.details: An automated campus gate logging system using YOLOv12 for vehicle detection, an optimized YOLO model for license plates, and EasyOCR for text parsing. Employs a Flask backend, MongoDB, Socket.IO, and real-time Telegram alerts.

key_projects.title: Kerala Career Compass
key_projects.details: An AI-powered guidance system serving Kerala students. Implements a Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG) architecture streaming institutional data out of MongoDB into Llama 3.1.
